seedLabel: Manual placeholder metrics scaffold — not live GA/GSC data
placeholderDisclaimer: Manual placeholder metrics only. Values are not measured traffic and must not be interpreted as audited analytics until operator-approved GA/GSC analytics are connected.
awaitingAnalyticsNote: Awaiting real GA/GSC analytics approval. Placeholder zeros are for local reporting structure proof only.
perItemNote: Placeholder not measured — page not published or analytics not connected.
verificationRequiredNotes: Do not present manual placeholder metrics as audited or live performance.
Per-page metrics remain zero until pages are published and real analytics are approved.
